title: AN ACT TO AMEND SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWO HUNDRED AND EIGHTY-SIX.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2577 / 45 OG No. 7, 2775 (July, 1949)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 377, June 14, 1949 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWO HUNDRED AND EIGHTY-SIX.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section two of Republic Act Numbered Two hundred and eighty-six is amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 2. The boundaries and limits of the territory said municipality are established and defined as follows:

"Starting from a point in the intersection of latitude SÂ°" 04' 00" North, and longitude 123Â° 10' 00" East going in a straight line eastward to the provincial boundary line between Zamboanga and Misamis Occidental, thence northÂ¬ward along that same provincial boundary up to the line defined by latitude 8Â° 20' 00" North, thence westward along that same latitude 8Â° 20' 00" North until it intersects the longitude 123Â° 10' 00" East, thence southward in a straight line down to the starting point."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 14, 1949.
